1-4-english-medium: This verse from Bhagavad Gita is describing a significant number of heroes and skilled warriors who are prepared for battle. These warriors are equal in strength to Arjuna, Bheema, Yuyudhana, Virata, and Drupada - all known as great warriors themselves.

In our daily lives, we can learn from these warriors' determination, discipline, and readiness to face challenges head-on. Just like them, we should strive for excellence in our chosen fields and be ready to take on the battles life throws at us with courage and perseverance. Embrace your inner warrior and step up when it matters!

Sanskrit:
अत्र शूरा महेष्वासा भीमार्जुनसमा युधि।
युयुधानो विराटश्च द्रुपदश्च महारथः।।1.4।।
